description: Composition Dark grey knee length skirt made of 63% polyester, 34% viscose and 3% lycra, has two front and two back pleats, size adjusting buttoned tabs on back, centre back opening with zipper and hook and eye fastening, centre back seam ending in slit at centre back Fit Slim Wash care Machine wash in cold water Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Line dry in shade Warm iron This skirt is a classic formal option for the working woman who wants to keep hold of her femininity at work. Worn with a crisp white shirt, this outfit will show the world you mean business. Try accessorising your shirt with a pretty silk scarf in place of a tie to softly frame your face. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5' 8" and waist 26"
